data.content: Repo-switch loading behavior now matches the knot acceptance criteria, but this implementation review is rejected for code drift. On branch foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback, the repo-switch change sits on top of an outdated base that removes the already-merged terminal light theme feature from main. Preserve the repo-switch loading behavior, but rebase or reapply it on current main without deleting the terminal theme controls/persistence files.
